name: omc-custom-worker-with-pi
description: Extend oh-my-claudecode teams with pi CLI workers. Use any pi-supported LLM provider (zai, openai, gemini, etc.) as a team worker alongside native claude, codex, and gemini workers.

default_provider.title: Default Pi Provider
default_provider.description: The default LLM provider for pi workers (e.g., zai, openai, gemini). Run 'pi --list-models' to see available providers.

default_model.title: Default Pi Model
default_model.description: The default model ID for the provider (e.g., glm-5.1, gpt-5). Leave empty to use the provider's default.
